entry.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Filerz Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 20, 23:00 UTC  -  Aug 21, 04:00 UTC

Jul 9, 03:16 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our responsibilities for Mail filerz, we will be performing infrastructure maintenance.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Start time : 20/08/2026 23:00 UTC
End time : 21/08/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster131 - Filerz1641 incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 22, 00:34 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 21/07/2026 21:55 UTC
End time : 22/07/2026 00:23 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 21, 22:08 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary issue in the Cluster131 - Filerz1641.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/07/2026 21:55 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Filerz1641 is unreachable on Web Hosting Cluster131.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on Filerz1641 - Cluster131.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster105 Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 21, 11:24 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 21/07/2026 10:05 UTC
End time : 21/07/2026 10:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 21, 11:01 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offering in the GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/07/2026 10:05 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Administrative task processing for Cluster105 is experiencing delays.
Customers Impact : Customers may experience delays, as all deliveries and hosting configuration changes are temporarily paused.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 21, 10:13 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering has been resolved.

Start time : 21/07/2026 09:17 UTC
End time : 21/07/2026 09:46 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 21, 09:48 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Collaborative solutions offering in GLOBAL region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/07/2026 09:17 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : MX Plan mailboxes are temporarily unavailable.
Customer Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their mailboxes.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Zimbra maintenance notification
entry.content:
Jul 20, 22:54 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 20, 13:05 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 20, 12:59 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Zimbra offer.

Start time : 20/07/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 22/07/2026 12:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance, Zimbra mailboxes will be temporarily unavailable for 5 minutes.
Please note that no mail will be lost during the operation.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Collaborative solutions infrastructure for our Zimbra offer.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz277 Cluster113 incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 20, 13:45 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering on Filerz277 - Cluster113 has been resolved.

Start time : 19/07/2026 22:41 UTC
End time : 20/07/2026 13:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 20, 13:12 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The intervention on the affected RAID disks is still in progress.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 20, 11:03 UTC
Identified - Please find an update of this incident below :

Start time : 19/07/2026 22:41 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz277 is unreachable on Web Hosting cluster113.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their websites hosted on the affected filerz.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
The root cause has been identified as a RAID disks failure. The RAID reconstruction is expected to take between 5 and 6 hours. All websites hosted on filerz277 have been placed into maintenance mode until 20/07/2026 06:00 UTC.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
